meta.title: Nordven - Web, ERP, and Infrastructure for modern teams
meta.description: Nordven builds calm, durable software for ambitious teams. Web product, internal platforms, and cloud infrastructure - shipped end to end.

footer.tagline: Calm, durable software for teams that move quickly.

hero.eyebrow: Studio for product and platform engineering
hero.titleB: from the first pixel to the last deploy.
hero.subtitle: We design, build, and operate web products, internal ERP platforms, and the cloud infrastructure underneath them - as one team, on one timeline.

marquee.title: Trusted by teams shipping in regulated, high-traffic, and zero-to-one environments.

services.title: Three practices. One throughline.
services.subtitle: Every engagement starts with the same question: what would a calm, well-engineered version of this look like?

process.title: A short loop, repeated until it ships.
process.subtitle: No discovery theater, no 80-page decks. We commit to a small slice, ship it, and let the next slice be informed by what we learned.

steps.title: Frame
steps.body: One week to align on outcomes, constraints, and the smallest meaningful first release.

steps.title: Design
steps.body: Interface, data model, and infrastructure designed together - never in isolation.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: Weekly demos in a real environment. Pull requests, not status updates.

steps.title: Operate
steps.body: We stay on after launch: monitoring, iteration, on-call rotation if you want it.

items.label: Average time to first production deploy

cta.title: Have something complex on the roadmap?
cta.subtitle: Send a short note. You will hear back from a human within one business day.

web.name: Web
web.short: Product and marketing experiences that load fast and age well.
web.intro: Marketing sites, SaaS dashboards, and customer-facing portals - built with the same engineering rigor you would put behind a backend service.

capabilities.title: Marketing and brand sites
capabilities.body: Editable, performant sites that the marketing team actually wants to use.

capabilities.title: SaaS interfaces
capabilities.body: Dashboards, settings, billing, admin - the unglamorous surfaces, made calm.

capabilities.title: Design systems
capabilities.body: A shared visual language between design and engineering, codified in tokens and components.

capabilities.title: Performance and accessibility
capabilities.body: Core Web Vitals in the green, WCAG 2.2 AA as a baseline, not an afterthought.

web.engagement: Most web engagements run six to twelve weeks for a first release, then continue as a retained partnership.

erp.name: ERP
erp.short: Internal platforms that replace the spreadsheet sprawl.
erp.tagline: The system your business actually runs on.
erp.intro: Custom ERP, CRM, and operations platforms designed around how your team really works - not how a SaaS vendor wishes you did.

capabilities.title: Workflow and approvals
capabilities.body: Multi-step processes, role-based access, audit trails that survive an audit.

capabilities.title: Integrations
capabilities.body: Finance, payments, identity, communications - connected through typed contracts, not brittle scripts.

capabilities.title: Reporting and analytics
capabilities.body: Operational dashboards that update in real time and read like sentences, not pivot tables.

capabilities.title: Migration from legacy
capabilities.body: Spreadsheets, Airtable, aging in-house tools - migrated with the data and the institutional knowledge intact.

erp.engagement: ERP engagements start with a four-week framing sprint to map the domain, then move into incremental delivery.

infra.name: Infra
infra.intro: Cloud architecture, CI/CD, and observability that lets your team ship daily without paging anyone at night.

capabilities.title: Cloud architecture
capabilities.body: Right-sized AWS, GCP, or hybrid environments - codified in Terraform, reviewed like product code.

capabilities.title: CI/CD and developer experience
capabilities.body: Pipelines that finish in minutes, previews on every pull request, rollbacks that just work.

capabilities.title: Observability
capabilities.body: Logs, metrics, and traces wired together - so the first question is always answered by a dashboard.

capabilities.title: Reliability and on-call
capabilities.body: Runbooks, SLOs, and an optional shared on-call rotation while your team grows into its own.

infra.engagement: Infra engagements typically start with a two-week audit, followed by a structured remediation plan.

about.title: A small, senior team. On purpose.
about.lead: Nordven is a studio of engineers and designers who have shipped together for years. We keep the team small so the people who scope your project are the same people who write the code and answer the on-call page.

values.title: Senior by default
values.body: Every person on your project has shipped production software for a decade or more.

values.title: One throughline
values.body: Web, ERP, and Infra under one team - no integration drama between vendors.

values.title: Calm by design
values.body: We optimize for software that does not page anyone at 2 a.m. - including us.

values.title: Outcomes we can name
values.body: Each engagement has a measurable outcome we can describe in a single sentence.

contact.title: Tell us about the project.
contact.subtitle: A few sentences is plenty. We will reply within one business day with a calendar link.

form.name: Your name
form.success: Thank you. We will be in touch shortly.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email hello@nordven.com.

validation.messageTooShort: A sentence or two helps us prepare.

direct.title: Prefer email?
direct.body: Write to <link>{address}</link>. We read every message.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: The page you were looking for has moved or never existed.
